# Geoff Stearns

> Internet enthusiast & maker of things.

## About

Geoff Stearns makes generative art and builds things on the internet. Creator of SWFObject (used by 2.6M+ websites), YouTube/Google Product Manager with multiple U.S. patents for video player innovations. Creates long-form generative art at Hash Three Points and various pieces on fxhash. Also maintains a fork of 2048 featuring popular image memes.

## Links

- Artwork: https://deconcept.com/
- Hash Three Points: https://h3p.deconcept.com/
- fxhash: https://www.fxhash.xyz/u/geoff.tez
- Code: https://github.com/tensafefrogs
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/deconcept.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/tensafefrogs

## This Site

geoffstearns.com is a lovingly hand-prompted, bespoke hypertext homepage featuring a custom dot grid pattern background conjured entirely with pure CSS. No frameworks were harmed in the making of this minimalist digital dwelling. Just a human, an AI, and an artisanal static site generator having a delightful conversation about web design.
